name: alexmskills-beta
description: Beta channel for alexmskills — unreleased and in-progress plugins. Unstable; expect breaking changes. Promote to the stable `alexmskills` marketplace when ready.

plugins.name: tune-repo
plugins.description: Audit and tighten a repo's CLAUDE.md and guardrails so Claude Code works faster and more accurately in it: verify CLAUDE.md against reality, tighten the verify loop, add missing static guardrails, cut permission friction.

plugins.name: prompt-coach
plugins.description: Watches every prompt you send Claude Code and nudges you toward better prompting habits — fundamentals (definition-of-done, guardrails, verification), classical techniques (few-shot, chain-of-thought, rubric, uncertainty budget), goals & loops, and Claude-Code-native tool delegation (plan mode, TaskCreate, parallel agents, roles, brainstorm-panel, Workflow). Also cheers you on when you do the right thing: 19 positive detectors mirror the negative rules, plus milestone celebrations on mastery and first-after-fire moments — sparing, specific, process-focused praise (Brophy 1981, Mueller-Dweck 1998, Fogg 2019) with a light touch of humor to keep the coach from reading like a therapy app. Tiered mastery — coach fades as you improve. Configurable nudge_style (both / silent / log-only) applies to praise too; disable_praise silences encouragement without silencing nudges.
